benchmarks.description: Direct concept lookup — exact topic match

benchmarks.query: How does attention work in neural networks?
benchmarks.description: Multi-page retrieval — attention is the primary target, transformers is related

benchmarks.query: What is BERT and how does it relate to transformers?
benchmarks.description: Cross-reference retrieval — BERT links to transformers
Keyword-heavy query — tests FTS5 keyword matching
Citation/source retrieval — finds page by source reference
Alias retrieval — 'scaled-dot-product attention' is an alias on the attention page
Paraphrased query — concept described indirectly via its advantage over RNNs
Broader concept query — should find BERT as the pre-trained model in the vault
Broad retrieval — tests whether multiple related pages surface for a general query
